source.description: Approved six-panel raster contact sheet cropped to reviewed JPG masters.
source.notes: One centered fan stays stable in every panel.

process_strategy: The base, cord, cage, hub, blades, spokes, and shading all appear before final contour polish.

final_elements.name: base and stand
final_elements.description: A low oval base, tapered upright stand, and short trailing cord established below the fan.

final_elements.name: round cage
final_elements.description: A centered double-line circular wire cage connected to the already drawn stand.

final_elements.name: hub
final_elements.description: A small circular center hub and neck collar placed at the exact center of the cage.

final_elements.name: hub and blades
final_elements.description: Four broad rounded blades radiating evenly from the established center hub.

final_elements.name: spokes cord and shading
final_elements.description: Radial cage spokes, the already visible trailing cord, and soft graphite metal tone on established base, stand, and blades.

frames.visible_job: Draw a light oval base, tapered upright stand, large cage guide circle, and short trailing cord.
Refine the large guide into a centered double-line circular wire cage attached to the established stand.
Add a small circular center hub and a short neck collar where the established stand meets the cage.
Draw four broad rounded blades that start at the established hub and curve outward inside the cage.
Add radial cage spokes and soft directional graphite shade to the established base, stand, hub, and blades.

final_step.visible_job: Darken only the existing base, stand, cage, spokes, hub, blades, cord, and metal shading.

rejection_checks: No blade or cord first appears in the final.
One pose crop and scale throughout.
